blended.narrative: Lakeridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.5 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 76 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
